title: Islamic Finance Arrangements
subtitle: Register Sharia-compliant finance arrangements. Source terms preserved; AAOIFI labels surfaced alongside IFRS conventional equivalents. Posting deferred pending the profit-accrual + installment-payment backend runners.
empty_description: Create an arrangement to register a Murabaha, Ijara, Mudaraba, Musharaka, Wakala, Sukuk, or custom Sharia-compliant facility. Generate its expected schedule and mark installments paid as cash clears.

detail.label: ARRANGEMENT
detail.schedule_empty: No schedule yet. Generate the expected installment plan from the arrangement terms.
detail.posting_deferred_note: Note: profit-accrual and installment-payment journal entries are deferred pending the backend runners (FN-247 service-layer partial landed; JE splice in follow-up dispatch).

modal.label: NEW ARRANGEMENT
modal.title: Create Islamic Finance Arrangement
modal.hint: Source term is preserved exactly (e.g. "Tawarruq Murabaha"). AAOIFI labels surface on disclosures; IFRS conventional equivalents surface on comparative statements.
modal.source_term_placeholder: e.g. Tawarruq Murabaha, Ijara Muntahia Bittamleek
modal.source_term_hint: Record the contract's exact Sharia-structure name. This is surfaced on disclosures unchanged.
modal.error_facility_amount: Facility amount must be a positive decimal with up to 3 places.
modal.error_rate_format: Profit rate must be 0..100 with up to 2 decimals.
modal.error_maturity_after_contract: Maturity date must be strictly after contract date.
modal.error_generic: Failed to create arrangement. Please try again.

paid_modal.label: MARK PAID
paid_modal.title: Mark Installment #{{n}} Paid
paid_modal.error_amount: Paid amount must be a positive decimal with up to 3 places.
paid_modal.error_generic: Failed to mark paid. Please try again.
